Interface IItemTemplateArray

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an item template array.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("261BE5CB-6940-4064-A07A-E3B826EB72F5")]
public interface IItemTemplateArray

The property count.
